raw.name: get-annotated-message
raw.title: Get Annotated Message Tool
raw.description: Demonstrates how annotations can be used to provide metadata about content.

messageType.description: Type of message to demonstrate different annotation patterns

includeImage.description: Whether to include an example image

raw.name: get-env
raw.title: Print Environment Tool
raw.description: Returns all environment variables, helpful for debugging MCP server configuration

raw.name: get-resource-links
raw.title: Get Resource Links Tool
raw.description: Returns up to ten resource links that reference different types of resources

count.description: Number of resource links to return (1-10)

raw.name: get-resource-reference
raw.title: Get Resource Reference Tool
raw.description: Returns a resource reference that can be used by MCP clients

resourceId.description: ID of the text resource to fetch

raw.name: get-structured-content
raw.title: Get Structured Content Tool
raw.description: Returns structured content along with an output schema for client data validation

raw.name: get-sum
raw.title: Get Sum Tool
raw.description: Returns the sum of two numbers

raw.name: get-tiny-image
raw.title: Get Tiny Image Tool
raw.description: Returns a tiny MCP logo image.

raw.name: gzip-file-as-resource
raw.title: GZip File as Resource Tool
raw.description: Compresses a single file using gzip compression. Depending upon the selected output type, returns either the compressed data as a gzipped resource or a resource link, allowing it to be downloaded in a subsequent request during the current session.

data.description: URL or data URI of the file content to compress

outputType.description: How the resulting gzipped file should be returned. 'resourceLink' returns a link to a resource that can be read later, 'resource' returns a full resource object.

raw.name: toggle-simulated-logging
raw.title: Toggle Simulated Logging
raw.description: Toggles simulated, random-leveled logging on or off.

raw.name: toggle-subscriber-updates
raw.title: Toggle Subscriber Updates
raw.description: Toggles simulated resource subscription updates on or off.

raw.name: trigger-long-running-operation
raw.title: Trigger Long Running Operation Tool
raw.description: Demonstrates a long running operation with progress updates.

duration.description: Duration of the operation in seconds

steps.description: Number of steps in the operation

raw.name: simulate-research-query
raw.title: Simulate Research Query
raw.description: Simulates a deep research operation that gathers, analyzes, and synthesizes information. Demonstrates MCP task-based operations with progress through multiple stages. If 'ambiguous' is true and client supports elicitation, sends an elicitation request for clarification.

ambiguous.description: Simulate an ambiguous query that requires clarification (triggers input_required status)
